tasks.label: Project: Configure Git hooks
tasks.detail: Auto-run on folder open - set core.hooksPath to repo .githooks
tasks.command: repo_root="$(git -C "${workspaceFolder}" rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && git -C "$repo_root" config core.hooksPath "$repo_root/.githooks" && find "$repo_root/.githooks" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec chmod +x {} +
